summary: Frontend testing of Work Orders tab and Labours tab Work Orders sub-tab - All features working correctly. Work Orders show correct amounts (Selvam ₹7.50L, Kumar ₹1.60L, Rajesh ₹1.05L), detail views with Scope/Stages/Additional/DLR tabs, approval workflow with Approve/Reject buttons, and Back to List functionality.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <div> inside <tbody> in Project Stages table - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

work_orders_tab.details: 3 work orders displayed with correct amounts - Selvam & Co (₹7.50L, Paid: ₹3.00L, 2/4 stages paid), Kumar Electricals (₹1.60L, Paid: ₹80,000, 1/2 stages paid), Rajesh Plumbing (₹1.05L, Paid: ₹60,000, 1/2 stages paid)

work_orders_detail_view.details: Detail view shows Scope (1), Stages (4), Additional (0), DLR tabs. Scope tab shows Mason Work - Lump Sum - ₹7.50L. Scope Total: ₹7.50L. Freeze, Edit, Delete buttons available.

work_orders_stages_tab.details: 4 stages displayed with approval trail - Foundation Mason Work (Paid), Plinth Mason Work (Paid), GF Walls & Slab (PM Approved with Approve/Reject buttons), FF Walls (Pending). Approval trail badges: SE Requested → PM OK → Planning OK → Paid

labours_tab_work_orders_subtab.details: Shows identical 3 work orders as Work Orders tab - Selvam & Co (₹7.50L), Kumar Electricals (₹1.60L), Rajesh Plumbing (₹1.05L). Create Work Order button available.

labours_wo_detail_view.details: Detail view shows Back to List button, Scope (1), Stages (4), Additional (0), DLR tabs. Same functionality as Work Orders tab detail view.

labours_wo_stages_tab.details: 4 stages with approval trail - Foundation Mason Work (Paid), Plinth Mason Work (Paid), GF Walls & Slab (PM Approved with Approve/Reject buttons), FF Walls (Pending)

back_to_list_button.details: Back to List button works correctly - returns to list view showing all 3 work orders

data_consistency.details: Work Orders tab and Labours tab Work Orders sub-tab show identical data - same 3 work orders with same amounts, stages, and approval status

seed_data_creation: Seed data correctly populated with 3 work orders: Selvam & Co (₹7.50L total, ₹3.00L paid, 4 stages), Kumar Electricals (₹1.60L total, ₹80K paid, 2 stages), Rajesh Plumbing (₹1.05L total, ₹60K paid, 2 stages)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Orders tab and Labours tab Work Orders sub-tab fully functional. Both tabs fetch from same API endpoint (/api/projects/{id}/work-orders) and display identical data. Detail views include Scope, Stages, Additional, DLR tabs with approval workflow. Approve/Reject buttons appear for PM Approved status stages.
features_tested: Work Orders tab - correct amounts displayed (₹7.50L, ₹1.60L, ₹1.05L)
Work Orders tab detail view - Scope, Stages, Additional, DLR tabs
Labours tab > Work Orders sub-tab - same 3 work orders with correct amounts
Labours tab > WO detail view - click Selvam card, see 4 stages with approval trail
Labours tab > WO detail view > Scope tab shows scope items
Labours tab > WO detail view > Back to List button works
Labours tab > WO detail view > Stages show Approve/Reject buttons for PM Approved status
Work Orders tab and Labours tab Work Orders sub-tab show identical data
